title: Cowill
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Mon_Cal_Knight.jpg|thumb|A [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mon Calamari Knights/Legends|Knight]] with an [[Energy lance/Legends|energy lance]] and a [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]]-woven cowill-shell shield]]
'''Cowill''' were shelled creatures that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Calamari]]. Their shells were carried as personal shields by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mon Calamari Knights/Legends|Knights]].

{{Creature-stub}}
